flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Western Governors University fell 40% between 2021 and 2024 (54.8% → 33.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Western Governors University fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (63.6% → 46.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Governors University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $8.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Governors University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $8.7k).
